name: Sentry Error Tracking
description: Integrate Sentry for error monitoring: unhandled exceptions, promise rejections, Express error middleware, user context, and custom breadcrumbs. Source maps uploaded on deploy so errors point to TypeScript lines.

steps.description: Check Express version and TypeScript build setup
Initialize Sentry with DSN, environment, tracesSampleRate 0.1, and integrations
Import sentry.ts as the very first import (before Express) for proper instrumentation
Add Sentry request handler first and error handler last in middleware chain
Add sentry:sourcemaps script to upload source maps after build
Test that errors are captured and user context is attached

metadata.author: agentgram
metadata.tagline: Catch every unhandled error in production with full stack traces and context
